text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: How did I end up here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...!
This roller coaster... It's a tough one, to be sure.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
However, I will accept its challenge and emerge victorious! Come—we
ride to battle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This chaos all started a few hours ago.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm spending the afternoon in town on my day off when I spot Yaeno
reading flyers on a train station billboard.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hello, Trainer. What a coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Well, I thought long about the break I was supposed to take. I
concluded that I should take action and start searching for activities
that could distract me from training long enough to rest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That said, I live by the discipline of martial arts. I'm embarrassed to
admit that I am not familiar with many recreational sites in the area.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This is my chance to get her mind off training. I know just the place—somewhere anyone would enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The theme park... What an astute suggestion. I believe that may allow
even one as myself to unwind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's settled—let us be off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And now, here we are.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Whew... That roller coaster was formidable, indeed.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Fun? Naturally, I enjoyed the experience, but more than that... I was
impressed by the acceleration on the downward slopes.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
There are races with declines too. I've practiced for them, but this
ride has given me new ideas.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not gonna lie, I was expecting "Yeah!"—not a deep dive into the racing applications of roller coasters. I've gotta get her mind off training fast!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's too dark... Trainer! Where did you go?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm, my eyes are slowly adjusting.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: This is...

text_block_list.name: Ghost?
text_block_list.text:
Heeeehehehee! None who enter this mansion will ever see the light of
day again!

text_block_list.name: Ghost?
text_block_list.text: Hope you're ready for a spook!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: A spook?!
choice_data_list:
(Heh. The haunted mansion's got her full
attenti—)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: HAH!

text_block_list.name: Ghost?
text_block_list.text: Ack?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Do not think the dim light will hide you! Wretched spirit, you'll pay
for whatever you've done to my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hmm, it seems to have fled that way. Hehe... You can't outrun me!

text_block_list.name: Monster?
text_block_list.text: BOO! Heehee! Bet that gave you a fright!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Not a chance! Now take this! Kongo Yaegaki's ultimate finisher—

text_block_list.name: Monster?
text_block_list.text: EEP?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, get behind me! I'll fend off this beast!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Good. I kept a level head even before supernatural foes. That was
an excellent exercise in willpower... Wait!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I... I almost tried to connect the experience to my training. I'm sorry!
You invited me here to relax, and yet I betrayed your goodwill!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm supposed to be practicing restraint, not using every event as a
learning experience. Ah, what an amateur mistake!
choice_data_list:
You just need more practice. You'll get the
hang of relaxing if you keep trying.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh? But, I... I couldn't possibly ask you to help me practice not practicing. It'd be ridiculous...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I already caused you so much trouble over my break... And now I'm
troubling you again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Please don't worry about me. I swear to you that I'll overcome this
trial myself!
choice_data_list: Nope, I'm helping you until you get it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not backing down. This is the kind of guidance that trainers are for.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But—
choice_data_list:
And besides, it's fun watching you try to lighten
up!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huh? Um... It's... fun?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno looks at me, dumbfounded. It's getting late, though, so we
decide to call it for the day and head home to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On the train, Yaeno speaks up softly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Is it truly okay? For me to keep trying and failing...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I recognize that I'm immature... and that's a large part of why I devote
myself to practicing self-discipline.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I think it's also why, deep down, part of me was against your decision
to let go of that training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: So now...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...No, nothing. Allow me to think it over a little more first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yaeno falls silent. She doesn't say another word the whole way back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand a bit better now, though. She's been relying on training
to harness her energy for so long. Managing herself without it could
be a good experience for her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll be here to support her through it. Summer's right around the
corner, so now's the perfect time!
